set(VPX_ROOT ${ANDROID_QEMU2_TOP_DIR}/../libvpx/libvpx)
if(LINUX_AARCH64 OR DARWIN_AARCH64)
  android_add_library(
    TARGET libvpx
    LICENSE "BSD-3-Clause"
    NOTICE "REPO/LICENSE"
    REPO "${ANDROID_QEMU2_TOP_DIR}/../libvpx"
    URL  "https://android.googlesource.com/platform/external/libvpx/+/refs/heads/emu-master-dev"
    SRC # cmake-format: sortable
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/alloccommon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/arm/loopfilter_arm.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/arm/neon/bilinearpredict_neon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/arm/neon/copymem_neon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/arm/neon/dc_only_idct_add_neon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/arm/neon/dequant_idct_neon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/arm/neon/dequantizeb_neon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/arm/neon/idct_blk_neon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/arm/neon/iwalsh_neon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/arm/neon/loopfiltersimplehorizontaledge_neon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/arm/neon/loopfiltersimpleverticaledge_neon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/arm/neon/mbloopfilter_neon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/arm/neon/shortidct4x4llm_neon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/arm/neon/sixtappredict_neon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/arm/neon/vp8_loopfilter_neon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/blockd.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/dequantize.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/entropy.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/entropymode.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/entropymv.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/extend.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/filter.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/findnearmv.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/generic/systemdependent.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/idct_blk.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/idctllm.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/loopfilter_filters.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/mbpitch.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/modecont.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/quant_common.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/reconinter.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/reconintra.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/reconintra4x4.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/rtcd.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/setupintrarecon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/swapyv12buffer.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/treecoder.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/vp8_loopfilter.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/vp8_skin_detection.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/decoder/dboolhuff.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/decoder/decodeframe.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/decoder/decodemv.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/decoder/detokenize.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/decoder/onyxd_if.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/decoder/threading.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/arm/neon/denoising_neon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/arm/neon/fastquantizeb_neon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/arm/neon/shortfdct_neon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/arm/neon/vp8_shortwalsh4x4_neon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/bitstream.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/boolhuff.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/copy_c.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/dct.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/denoising.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/encodeframe.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/encodeintra.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/encodemb.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/encodemv.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/ethreading.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/firstpass.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/lookahead.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/mcomp.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/modecosts.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/onyx_if.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/pickinter.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/picklpf.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/ratectrl.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/rdopt.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/segmentation.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/temporal_filter.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/tokenize.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/treewriter.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/vp8_quantize.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/vp8_cx_iface.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/vp8_dx_iface.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/common/arm/neon/vp9_iht16x16_add_neon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/common/arm/neon/vp9_iht4x4_add_neon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/common/arm/neon/vp9_iht8x8_add_neon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/common/vp9_alloccommon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/common/vp9_blockd.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/common/vp9_common_data.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/common/vp9_entropy.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/common/vp9_entropymode.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/common/vp9_entropymv.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/common/vp9_filter.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/common/vp9_frame_buffers.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/common/vp9_idct.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/common/vp9_loopfilter.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/common/vp9_mvref_common.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/common/vp9_pred_common.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/common/vp9_quant_common.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/common/vp9_reconinter.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/common/vp9_reconintra.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/common/vp9_rtcd.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/common/vp9_scale.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/common/vp9_scan.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/common/vp9_seg_common.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/common/vp9_thread_common.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/common/vp9_tile_common.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/decoder/vp9_decodeframe.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/decoder/vp9_decodemv.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/decoder/vp9_decoder.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/decoder/vp9_detokenize.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/decoder/vp9_dsubexp.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/decoder/vp9_job_queue.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/arm/neon/vp9_error_neon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/arm/neon/vp9_frame_scale_neon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/arm/neon/vp9_quantize_neon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_alt_ref_aq.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_aq_360.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_aq_complexity.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_aq_cyclicrefresh.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_aq_variance.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_bitstream.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_context_tree.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_cost.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_dct.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_encodeframe.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_encodemb.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_encodemv.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_encoder.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_ethread.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_ext_ratectrl.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_extend.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_firstpass.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_frame_scale.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_lookahead.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_mbgraph.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_mcomp.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_multi_thread.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_noise_estimate.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_picklpf.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_pickmode.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_quantize.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_ratectrl.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_rd.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_rdopt.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_resize.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_segmentation.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_skin_detection.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_speed_features.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_subexp.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_svc_layercontext.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_temporal_filter.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_tokenize.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_treewriter.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/vp9_cx_iface.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/vp9_dx_iface.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/vp9_iface_common.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx/src/vpx_codec.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx/src/vpx_decoder.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx/src/vpx_encoder.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx/src/vpx_image.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_config.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/arm/avg_neon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/arm/avg_pred_neon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/arm/fdct16x16_neon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/arm/fdct32x32_neon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/arm/fdct_neon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/arm/fdct_partial_neon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/arm/fwd_txfm_neon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/arm/hadamard_neon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/arm/idct16x16_1_add_neon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/arm/idct16x16_add_neon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/arm/idct32x32_135_add_neon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/arm/idct32x32_1_add_neon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/arm/idct32x32_34_add_neon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/arm/idct32x32_add_neon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/arm/idct4x4_1_add_neon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/arm/idct4x4_add_neon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/arm/idct8x8_1_add_neon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/arm/idct8x8_add_neon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/arm/intrapred_neon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/arm/loopfilter_neon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/arm/quantize_neon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/arm/sad4d_neon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/arm/sad_neon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/arm/subpel_variance_neon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/arm/subtract_neon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/arm/sum_squares_neon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/arm/variance_neon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/arm/vpx_convolve8_neon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/arm/vpx_convolve_avg_neon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/arm/vpx_convolve_copy_neon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/arm/vpx_convolve_neon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/arm/vpx_scaled_convolve8_neon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/avg.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/bitreader.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/bitreader_buffer.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/bitwriter.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/bitwriter_buffer.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/fwd_txfm.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/intrapred.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/inv_txfm.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/loopfilter.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/prob.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/psnr.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/quantize.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/sad.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/skin_detection.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/subtract.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/sum_squares.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/variance.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/vpx_convolve.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/vpx_dsp_rtcd.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_mem/vpx_mem.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_ports/arm_cpudetect.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_scale/generic/gen_scalers.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_scale/generic/vpx_scale.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_scale/generic/yv12config.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_scale/generic/yv12extend.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_scale/vpx_scale_rtcd.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_util/vpx_thread.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_util/vpx_write_yuv_frame.c)
  target_compile_definitions(libvpx PRIVATE  -U_FORTIFY_SOURCE -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=0 -D_LARGEFILE_SOURCE -D_FILE_OFFSET_BITS=64)
else()
  android_nasm_compile(
    TARGET libvpx-asm
    LICENSE "BSD-3-Clause"
    NOTICE "REPO/LICENSE" INCLUDES ${VPX_ROOT} ${VPX_ROOT}/../config/x86_64
           ${VPX_ROOT}/../config/generic
    REPO "${ANDROID_QEMU2_TOP_DIR}/../libvpx"
         URL
         "https://android.googlesource.com/platform/external/libvpx/+/refs/heads/emu-master-dev"
    SRC # cmake-format: sortable
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/x86/dequantize_mmx.asm
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/x86/idctllm_mmx.asm
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/x86/idctllm_sse2.asm
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/x86/iwalsh_sse2.asm
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/x86/loopfilter_block_sse2_x86_64.asm
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/x86/loopfilter_sse2.asm
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/x86/mfqe_sse2.asm
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/x86/recon_mmx.asm
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/x86/recon_sse2.asm
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/x86/subpixel_mmx.asm
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/x86/subpixel_sse2.asm
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/x86/subpixel_ssse3.asm
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/x86/block_error_sse2.asm
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/x86/copy_sse2.asm
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/x86/copy_sse3.asm
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/x86/dct_sse2.asm
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/x86/fwalsh_sse2.asm
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/x86/temporal_filter_apply_sse2.asm
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/x86/vp9_dct_sse2.asm
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/x86/vp9_error_sse2.asm
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/x86/vp9_quantize_ssse3_x86_64.asm
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/x86/add_noise_sse2.asm
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/x86/avg_ssse3_x86_64.asm
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/x86/deblock_sse2.asm
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/x86/fwd_txfm_ssse3_x86_64.asm
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/x86/intrapred_sse2.asm
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/x86/intrapred_ssse3.asm
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/x86/inv_wht_sse2.asm
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/x86/sad4d_sse2.asm
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/x86/sad_sse2.asm
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/x86/sad_sse3.asm
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/x86/sad_sse4.asm
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/x86/sad_ssse3.asm
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/x86/ssim_opt_x86_64.asm
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/x86/subpel_variance_sse2.asm
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/x86/subtract_sse2.asm
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/x86/vpx_convolve_copy_sse2.asm
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/x86/vpx_subpixel_8t_sse2.asm
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/x86/vpx_subpixel_8t_ssse3.asm
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/x86/vpx_subpixel_bilinear_sse2.asm
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/x86/vpx_subpixel_bilinear_ssse3.asm
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_ports/emms_mmx.asm)
  android_add_library(
    TARGET libvpx
    LICENSE "BSD-3-Clause"
    NOTICE "REPO/LICENSE"
    REPO "${ANDROID_QEMU2_TOP_DIR}/../libvpx"
         URL
         "https://android.googlesource.com/platform/external/libvpx/+/refs/heads/emu-master-dev"
    SRC # cmake-format: sortable
        ${VPX_ROOT}/../config/x86_64/vpx_config.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/alloccommon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/blockd.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/dequantize.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/entropy.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/entropymode.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/entropymv.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/extend.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/filter.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/findnearmv.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/generic/systemdependent.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/idct_blk.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/idctllm.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/loopfilter_filters.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/mbpitch.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/mfqe.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/modecont.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/postproc.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/quant_common.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/reconinter.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/reconintra.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/reconintra4x4.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/rtcd.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/setupintrarecon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/swapyv12buffer.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/treecoder.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/vp8_loopfilter.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/vp8_skin_detection.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/x86/bilinear_filter_sse2.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/x86/idct_blk_mmx.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/x86/idct_blk_sse2.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/x86/loopfilter_x86.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/common/x86/vp8_asm_stubs.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/decoder/dboolhuff.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/decoder/decodeframe.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/decoder/decodemv.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/decoder/detokenize.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/decoder/onyxd_if.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/decoder/threading.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/bitstream.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/boolhuff.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/copy_c.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/dct.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/denoising.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/encodeframe.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/encodeintra.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/encodemb.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/encodemv.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/ethreading.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/firstpass.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/lookahead.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/mcomp.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/modecosts.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/onyx_if.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/pickinter.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/picklpf.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/ratectrl.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/rdopt.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/segmentation.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/temporal_filter.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/tokenize.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/treewriter.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/vp8_quantize.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/x86/denoising_sse2.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/x86/quantize_sse4.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/x86/vp8_enc_stubs_sse2.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/x86/vp8_quantize_sse2.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/encoder/x86/vp8_quantize_ssse3.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/vp8_cx_iface.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp8/vp8_dx_iface.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/common/vp9_alloccommon.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/common/vp9_blockd.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/common/vp9_common_data.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/common/vp9_entropy.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/common/vp9_entropymode.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/common/vp9_entropymv.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/common/vp9_filter.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/common/vp9_frame_buffers.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/common/vp9_idct.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/common/vp9_loopfilter.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/common/vp9_mvref_common.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/common/vp9_pred_common.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/common/vp9_quant_common.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/common/vp9_reconinter.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/common/vp9_reconintra.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/common/vp9_rtcd.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/common/vp9_scale.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/common/vp9_scan.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/common/vp9_seg_common.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/common/vp9_thread_common.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/common/vp9_tile_common.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/common/x86/vp9_idct_intrin_sse2.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/decoder/vp9_decodeframe.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/decoder/vp9_decodemv.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/decoder/vp9_decoder.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/decoder/vp9_detokenize.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/decoder/vp9_dsubexp.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/decoder/vp9_job_queue.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_alt_ref_aq.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_aq_360.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_aq_complexity.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_aq_cyclicrefresh.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_aq_variance.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_bitstream.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_context_tree.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_cost.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_dct.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_encodeframe.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_encodemb.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_encodemv.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_encoder.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_ethread.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_ext_ratectrl.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_extend.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_firstpass.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_frame_scale.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_lookahead.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_mbgraph.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_mcomp.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_multi_thread.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_noise_estimate.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_picklpf.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_pickmode.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_quantize.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_ratectrl.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_rd.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_rdopt.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_resize.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_segmentation.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_skin_detection.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_speed_features.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_subexp.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_svc_layercontext.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_temporal_filter.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_tokenize.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/vp9_treewriter.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/x86/temporal_filter_sse4.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/x86/vp9_dct_intrin_sse2.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/x86/vp9_diamond_search_sad_avx.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/x86/vp9_error_avx2.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/x86/vp9_frame_scale_ssse3.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/x86/vp9_quantize_avx2.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/encoder/x86/vp9_quantize_sse2.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/vp9_cx_iface.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/vp9_dx_iface.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vp9/vp9_iface_common.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx/src/vpx_codec.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx/src/vpx_decoder.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx/src/vpx_encoder.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx/src/vpx_image.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/add_noise.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/avg.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/bitreader.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/bitreader_buffer.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/bitwriter.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/bitwriter_buffer.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/deblock.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/fwd_txfm.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/intrapred.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/inv_txfm.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/loopfilter.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/prob.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/psnr.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/quantize.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/sad.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/skin_detection.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/subtract.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/sum_squares.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/variance.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/vpx_convolve.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/vpx_dsp_rtcd.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/x86/avg_intrin_avx2.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/x86/avg_intrin_sse2.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/x86/avg_pred_sse2.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/x86/fwd_txfm_avx2.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/x86/fwd_txfm_sse2.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/x86/inv_txfm_sse2.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/x86/inv_txfm_ssse3.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/x86/loopfilter_avx2.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/x86/loopfilter_sse2.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/x86/post_proc_sse2.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/x86/quantize_avx.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/x86/quantize_sse2.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/x86/quantize_ssse3.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/x86/sad4d_avx2.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/x86/sad4d_avx512.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/x86/sad_avx2.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/x86/sum_squares_sse2.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/x86/variance_avx2.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/x86/variance_sse2.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/x86/vpx_subpixel_4t_intrin_sse2.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/x86/vpx_subpixel_8t_intrin_avx2.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_dsp/x86/vpx_subpixel_8t_intrin_ssse3.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_mem/vpx_mem.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_scale/generic/gen_scalers.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_scale/generic/vpx_scale.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_scale/generic/yv12config.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_scale/generic/yv12extend.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_scale/vpx_scale_rtcd.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_util/vpx_thread.c
        ${VPX_ROOT}/vpx_util/vpx_write_yuv_frame.c)
  target_compile_options(
    libvpx
    PRIVATE -msse4.1
            -mssse3
            -msse2
            -mmmx
            -mavx2
            -mavx512f
            -mavx512cd
            -mavx512bw
            -mavx512dq
            -mavx512vl)
  target_include_directories(
    libvpx PUBLIC ${VPX_ROOT} PRIVATE ${VPX_ROOT}/../config/x86_64
                                      ${VPX_ROOT}/../config/generic)
  target_link_libraries(libvpx PRIVATE emulator-libyuv libvpx-asm)
endif()
